---
title: "eMarketer"
page-layout: article
---

# eMarketer

## Description

Market data and analysis platform focused on digital advertising, social media, e-commerce, retail, and consumer technology. Supports research on digital markets and media trends.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1980)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
